title: Providence mod
description: Layer "Fraud"...An angel...But its not that simple
body:
"Providence mod" added a new mob, that called "Providence".He is a formidable opponent who can cause a lot of trouble if you do not prepare well for a battle with him.

Mobs:
Providence:

health - 20
attack - 6.5

Weapon:
Angelic staff:

attack - 12
attack speed - 2

Structure:
Hotel "Fraud";

The place, where the Providences are located.
dont trust anything

Original game "Ultrakill" by Arsi "Hakita" Patala
